__________________ test_refunds_preserve_original_invoice_id ___________________

    def test_refunds_preserve_original_invoice_id():
        refund = refund_order("ord_20260705_abc123")
>       assert refund.invoice_id == "inv_20260705_000123"
E       AssertionError: expected invoice id inv_20260705_000123 but got inv_20260705_000124
E       assert 'inv_20260705_000124' == 'inv_20260705_000123'
